description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian with a slender build, standing upright with both arms raised and extended diagonally upward. The figure is dressed in a sleeveless top with a scoop neckline and button details, paired with straight-cut pants and simple shoes. The individual has medium-length hair styled with a center part, and the facial features are neutral and realistic. The arms are unusually elongated and stretched, creating a dramatic visual effect that is not typical for a human figure. The clothing fits closely to the body, and the shoes appear practical for walking. The overall appearance suggests a casual, everyday urban pedestrian, though the exaggerated arm pose is highly stylized.
description: An adult pedestrian figure standing upright with both arms dramatically raised and extended, wearing a sleeveless top, pants, and simple shoes, with medium-length hair and a neutral expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, sleeveless top, button details, and both arms raised and extended upward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm's extension, and the side seam of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the back of the top and pants, and the arms crossing behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm extension, and the fit of the clothing from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless casual top and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with both arms raised and extended diagonally
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length straight hair with a center part
